metric_name: Weekly PC market trend commentary
metric_value: The retail world calls this time of year the "Dads and Grads" season. It's the last holiday on which retailers count to get them through the slow summer months until "Back to School" shopping frenzy beings in August.
notes: Kastner market assessment for week of 2003-06-08

metric_name: BestBuy: buying tips for week of 2003-06-08
metric_value: At Best Buy stores this week, save $150 with Best Buy's mail-in rebate on all computer packages. Also receive no interest financing for 18 months on all these CPU bundles.

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-06-08
metric_value: Save up to $380 on select Desktop Computer Packages and enjoy no interest for 12 months. Circuitcity.com has free shipping on all its online items.

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-06-08
metric_value: CompUSA.com tends to continue selling "older" PC models after BestBuy.com and CircuitCity.com have removed them. This means you can get better deals on models that retailers want off the shelves to make room for the newer versions.

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-06-08
metric_value: The Dimension 4500 line has disappeared as expected with the 4600 and 4600C models taking its place. Dell's deals include free memory and second optical drive upgrades.

metric_name: eMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-06-08
metric_value: EMachines has once again revamped its line of models. EMachine's newest models launched at the same price points as its former brethren.

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-06-08
metric_value: Gateway.com seems to change its online graphics and layout almost weekly. While these frequent changes are initially confusing, Gateway does endeavor to make its website as user-friendly as possible.

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-06-08
metric_value: Sony.com offers a plethora of models right now, although, like eMachines, the best deals usually come from bundled retail offers. Receive free shipping, and a free Epson C42UX printer after mail-in rebate at Sony Online this week.

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-06-08
metric_value: HP Online offers competitive prices on its retail models, although national retailers usually carry well-priced bundled deals. For a few weeks www.hpshopping.com had the best prices on both HP and Compaq PCs.
